title: scleranthus perennis var. marginatus
intro: Scleranthus perennis var. marginatus, also known as the Alpine Knawel, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus perennis var. marginatus include its potential to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
